title: Solar Double Lamp Post
description: A much more attractive way to offer outdoor lighting this Solar Double Lamp Post is far more interesting than just an ordinary porch light. In a classic style with a dual head this large lamp post will make an unusual and striking feature in your garden. With 12 white LED bulbs it is ideal for lighting up pathways or doorways or just highlighting areas of interest at night. Made from aluminium tubing it comes complete with a ground spike and floor bolts for easy installation. The integral solar panels at the top of each lamp means that the lights will automatically come on at dusk and will light up for 6- 8 hours on full charge depending on the previous hours of sunshine.RoHS compliant No operating costs Eco friendly no wiring Durable and weatherproofRequires 2 x 3V 12 LED bulbs (included)Height : approx. 1.88mWe recommend that the solar panels are exposed to direct sunlight for as long as possible; they take approximately 10-16 hours to fully charge and provide approximately 6-8 hours of light.
